retry_reason: Failure (NULL) means either no matching node exists or the node is already being freed; retrying without a change in state would not succeed.
contract_summary: batadv_neigh_node_get is a lookup-and-acquire wrapper: it searches the orig_node's neigh_list under RCU protection for a neighbor matching the given address and incoming interface. If found and still alive (refcount non-zero), it increments the reference count via kref_get_unless_zero and returns the node with an elevated reference. The caller must check for NULL (indicating no match or dying object) and must later release the reference with batadv_neigh_node_put. The RCU read lock is held only during the lookup; the returned pointer remains valid due to the taken reference.
